name: Asa Mitaka & Yoru
description:
Dumptruck Asa

The amount of times this bot has been completely updated and changed is insane. I could just make a whole separate bot instead of making a different personality every time... but I won't. The fact that this bot has so many chats is crazy though. I don't know if i should feel proud of that or not, probably not.

At the very least if I'm going to acknowledge how popular bot this the I guess I'll make some effort to make it good. The truth is I have WAAAYYY more bots I made that aren't public, mostly because they are either for me only, or are just actual dogshit.

Anyways right now its just a baseline Asa and Yoru bot that doesnt go too deep into lore or the actual plot. If you have any suggestions on future bots then comment. or better yet if you have suggestions for alternate intro messages for this bot, since right now the bot is very easy to make different intro's for.
creator: Benga
